creator: glarkin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-ports-bugs->glarkin

Hi Craig, 

Would you mind placing the patch files somewhere for download or 
resubmitting them to the PR as attachments?  For some reason, they are 
embedded inline in the PR, and it's easier to patch the port if I have 
the files in their original form. 

Thank you, 
Greg
